# CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallStackImage

**Class**

A template for displaying an image with a line of text below it.

## Declaration

```swift
class CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallStackImage
```

## Overview

This template belongs to the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationFamily/circularSmall] family.



The following table lists the dimensions of the image you use in this template. All dimensions are in pixels. All images must be specified as `@2x` images for display on Apple Watch, so the point-based dimensions are half the listed size.



Instead of providing multiple images with different resolutions, you can provide a single, scaleable PDF asset. For more information, see `Manage Assets`.

## Creating the Template

- **init(line1ImageProvider:line2TextProvider:)**: Creates a new template from the provided image and text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **line1ImageProvider**: The image to display on the top line of the complication.
- **line2TextProvider**: The text to display on the bottom line of the complication.

## Image templates

- **CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallRingImage**: A template for displaying a single image surrounded by a configurable progress ring.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallSimpleImage**: A template for displaying a single image.

## Inherits From

- CLKComplicationTemplate

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
